## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] Overall coverage at 23.9%**
  - **Status quo:** 23.9% line coverage across 21 tests. Three packages at 0% (`cmd/symfritz/`, `internal/config/`, `internal/mcp/`). `internal/fritz/` at 49.4%, `internal/secret/` at 21.2%.
  - **Likely cause:** CLI glue, config loader, and MCP server were added without tests; core library tests focus on parsing/utility functions.
  - **Proposed solution:** Run `/test-coverage` to measure, then `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage` to create issues for test gaps. Not blocking — no hard coverage gate in CI.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-06-29T14-05-00Z.md`
